prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第62名逐步提升至2026年第57名，排名稳中有升，反映学校综合实力持续增强；2024年声誉评价中性/混合，涉及师德问题调查但处理及时；抖音热度排名第7（高热），综合热度739万，短视频平台曝光度极高，张雪峰多次推荐为"性价比很高的211"，报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术A、化学A-、材料科学与工程A-，3个A-及以上学科，化工、材料领域实力突出，与工科试验班（化工能源、先进材料）等招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热，与该校计算机类、自动化类等招生方向匹配，推高相关专业报考竞争；宁夏2026年考生总数约66000人，较2025年（约65897人）基本持平，竞争格局稳定；北京化工大学位于北京市，对宁夏考生具备较强地域吸引力；该校在宁夏理科招生计划占比较小（约59人），属跨省招生，受本地高校（宁夏大学）分流影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体前移趋势、2026年软科排名提升至第57名、抖音高热曝光及化工材料优势学科吸引力，预计2026年报考热度略有升温，竞争小幅加剧；在2025年基准3072名基础上预计前移约30名，预测最低位次约3042名，区间2542–3542名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 3444 → 3251 → 2979 → 3072. Over the past three years, the ranking has moved forward by about 372 places, but in 2025 it moved back by 93 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 3072. The provincial science enrollment plan was 53 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 59 in 2024, 59 in 2025, and 59 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has gradually improved from 62nd in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting a steady increase in comprehensive strength. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, involving an investigation into teacher ethics but handled promptly. Douyin popularity ranking is 7th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 7.39 million, extremely high exposure on short video platforms. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended it as a '211 with high cost-performance', attracting high application attention. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with three A- or above disciplines, showing outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials, closely related to enrollment majors such as Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy, Advanced Materials).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social heat, matching the university's enrollment directions like Computer Science and Automation, driving up competition for related majors. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Ningxia is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 65,897), with a stable competitive landscape. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Ningxia examinees. The university's science enrollment plan in Ningxia is relatively small (about 59 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited diversion impact from local universities (Ningxia University).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall forward trend of historical rankings, the improvement of Soft Science ranking to 57th in 2026, high Douyin exposure, and the appeal of advantageous disciplines in chemical engineering and materials, it is expected that the application heat in 2026 will slightly increase, with competition intensifying slightly. Based on the 2025 baseline of 3072, it is predicted to move forward by about 30 places, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3042, and a range of 2542–3542.

- Automation (Beijing).

- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2542–3542, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (High-End Equipment, Chemical Energy) as the main choice, with Tier 1 Computer Science and Automation as reach options, and Tier 3 Advanced Materials, Green Chemistry, etc., as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 2542), focus on reaching for Computer Science and the Chemistry Basic Top Talent class.
